title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXVII. Riddles.
content:
[A Cherry.]

        As I went through the garden gap,
        Who should I meet but Dick Red-cap!
        A stick in his hand, a stone in his throat,
        If you'll tell me this riddle, I'll give you a groat.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCXXVII. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
